title: MiniMax M3 赋能 Hermes Agent 自学创作
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
All powered by M3 on Hermes Agent @ NousResearch
Amber Shen
@whosamberella
13h
I didn't touch TouchDesigner myself. Hermes agent learned it from scratch and built this:
→ navigated my desktop with computer use
→ figured out how to connect to TouchDesigner
→ read my reference images
→ iterated on the art with me in a self-learning loop
→ then saved Show more
00:00
11:23 PM · Jun 13, 2026 10.4K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: MiniMax M3 赋能 Hermes Agent 自学创作
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 我本人没有操作 TouchDesigner。Hermes Agent 从头开始学习并完成了以下工作： → 使用计算机操控功能浏览我的桌面 → 弄明白如何连接到 TouchDesigner → 读取我的参考图像 → 与我一起在自我学习循环中迭代艺术作品 → 然后将学到的内容保存为可复用的技能，用于处理下一张图像 这一切均由 @MiniMax_AI M3 × Hermes Desktop Agent @NousResearch 驱动。 完整演示 📽️
